headline_seed: Supreme Court gives abortion pill mifepristone a 1-week reprieve from a major change - NPR
draft_text:
Justice Alito blocked a 5th Circuit ruling Monday, restoring telehealth and mail access to mifepristone through at least May 11. The stay came after emergency appeals by Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro. NPR and CNN both confirm.

And that's the mews.
